HEXAGHOST-ADVANCING_GUARD.title: Advancing Guard
HEXAGHOST-APOCRYPHRA.title: Apocryphra
HEXAGHOST-APOCRYPHRA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and [afterlife]apply[/afterlife] {SoulBurnPower:diff()} [afterlife]Soulburn to ALL enemies.
Return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].[/afterlife]
HEXAGHOST-BACKTRACK_SMACK.title: Backtrack Smack
HEXAGHOST-BAD_OMEN.description: Choose a Ghostflame type to change the current one into.
HEXAGHOST-BAD_OMEN.title: Bad Omen
HEXAGHOST-BAD_OMEN_CHOICE.description: Replace the current Ghostflame with a [gold]{Ghostflame}[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-BAD_OMEN_CHOICE.title: Bad Omen
HEXAGHOST-BRIGHT_RITUAL.description:
Reset the Wheel.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} for each Ghostflame [gold]Extinguished[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-BRIGHT_RITUAL.title: Bright Ritual
HEXAGHOST-BROILING_FLAMES.title: Broiling Flames
HEXAGHOST-BROILING_FLAMES.description: This turn, whenever another player deals attack damage to this enemy, it gains {BroilingFlamesPower:diff()} [gold]Soulburn[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-BURNING_QUESTION.description:
Choose one: 
Gain {IntensityPower:diff()} [gold]Intensity[/gold].
Gain {MetallicizePower:diff()} [gold]Metallicize[/gold].
Gain {RoyaltiesPower:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold] at the end of combat.
HEXAGHOST-BURNING_QUESTION.title: Burning Question
HEXAGHOST-BURNING_QUESTION_CHOICE1.title: Burning Question
HEXAGHOST-BURNING_QUESTION_CHOICE2.title: Burning Question
HEXAGHOST-BURNING_QUESTION_CHOICE3.descr: Gain {RoyaltiesPower:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold] at the end of combat.
HEXAGHOST-BURNING_QUESTION_CHOICE3.title: Burning Question
HEXAGHOST-BURNING_TOUCH.description: Apply {SoulBurnPower:diff()} [gold]Soulburn[/gold], twice if the enemy has [gold]Soulburn[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-BURNING_TOUCH.title: Burning Touch
HEXAGHOST-CATCH_UP.title: Catch Up
HEXAGHOST-CAUTERIZE.title: Cauterize
HEXAGHOST-CAUTERIZE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Soulburn[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
HEXAGHOST-CHARGED_BARRAGE.title: Charged Barrage
HEXAGHOST-DEFEND_HEXAGHOST.title: Defend
HEXAGHOST-DEVILS_DANCE.description: The first {IfUpgraded:show:{DevilsDancePower:diff()} times|time} you [gold]Advance[/gold] or [gold]Retract[/gold] each turn, draw a card.
HEXAGHOST-DEVILS_DANCE.title: Devil's Dance
HEXAGHOST-DEVOUR_FLAME.description: If the previous Ghostflame is [gold]Ignited[/gold], [gold]Retract[/gold] and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-DEVOUR_FLAME.title: Devour Flame
HEXAGHOST-DISPLACE.title: Displace
HEXAGHOST-DISPLACE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Place a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-DIVIDER.title: Divider
HEXAGHOST-DOOMSDAY.description: The next time all 6 Ghostflames are [gold]Ignited[/gold], take an extra turn after ending your turn.
HEXAGHOST-DOOMSDAY.title: Doomsday
HEXAGHOST-EERIE_EXPEDITION.description:
All players add 1 random [gold]Afterlife[/gold] card to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
It's free to play this turn.
HEXAGHOST-EERIE_EXPEDITION.title: Eerie Expedition
HEXAGHOST-EMPOWERED_FLAME.title: Empowered Flame
HEXAGHOST-ETHER_STEP.title: Ether Step
HEXAGHOST-EXTRA_CRISPY.description: Whenever [gold]Soulburn[/gold] detonates, the enemy loses {ExtraCrispyPower:diff()} HP and gains {ExtraCrispyPower:diff()} [gold]Soulburn[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-EXTRA_CRISPY.title: Extra Crispy
HEXAGHOST-FAST_FORWARD.title: Fast Forward
HEXAGHOST-FIFTH_SEAL.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:|Ethereal }[gold]Seal[/gold].
At the end of combat, increase your Max HP by {FifthSealPower:diff()} .
HEXAGHOST-FIFTH_SEAL.title: Sixth Seal
HEXAGHOST-FIRESTARTER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {SoulBurnPower:diff()} [gold]Soulburn[/gold] to ALL enemies.
HEXAGHOST-FIRESTARTER.title: Firestarter
HEXAGHOST-FIRST_SEAL.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:|Ethereal }[gold]Seal[/gold].
At the end of combat, heal {FirstSealPower:diff()} HP.
HEXAGHOST-FIRST_SEAL.title: First Seal
HEXAGHOST-FLAMES_FROM_BEYOND.title: Flames from Beyond
HEXAGHOST-FLARE_FLICK.title: Flare Flick
HEXAGHOST-FLARE_FLICK_CHOICE.title: Flare Flick
HEXAGHOST-FLASHBANG.title: Flashbang
HEXAGHOST-FLASHBANG.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the current Ghostflame is [gold]Ignited[/gold], target enemy loses {TemporaryStrengthDownPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
HEXAGHOST-FLEETING_FLARE.title: Fleeting Flare
HEXAGHOST-FLOAT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you've played less than {CardsPlayed:diff()} cards this turn, draw {Cards:plural:a card|{Cards:diff()} cards} and [gold]Advance[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-FLOAT.title: Float
HEXAGHOST-FLOATWORK.title: Floatwork
HEXAGHOST-FORKED_FLAME.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Ignite[/gold] the previous and next Ghostflames.
HEXAGHOST-FORKED_FLAME.title: Forked Flame
HEXAGHOST-FOURTH_SEAL.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:|Ethereal }[gold]Seal[/gold].
At the end of combat, gain an additional Potion reward.
HEXAGHOST-FOURTH_SEAL.title: Fourth Seal
HEXAGHOST-GHOSTFLAME_BARRIER.title: Ghostflame Barrier
HEXAGHOST-GHOSTFLAME_BARRIER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you are attacked this turn, apply {GhostflameBarrierPower:diff()} [gold]Soulburn[/gold] back.
HEXAGHOST-GHOST_LASH.description:
[afterlife]Deal[/afterlife] {CalculatedDamage:diff()} [afterlife]damage.[/afterlife]
Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each other [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card in [gold]Hand[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-GHOST_LASH.title: Ghost Lash
HEXAGHOST-GHOST_SHIELD.description:
[afterlife]Gain[/afterlife] {Block:diff()} [afterlife][gold]Block[/gold].[/afterlife]
[gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your next turn.
HEXAGHOST-GHOST_SHIELD.title: Ghost Shield
HEXAGHOST-GIFTS_FROM_BEYOND.description: At the start of your turn, add {GiftsFromBeyondPower:diff()} random [gold]Afterlife[/gold] card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-GIFTS_FROM_BEYOND.title: Gifts from Beyond
HEXAGHOST-HAUNTED_HAND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw cards until you draw a non-[gold]Ethereal[/gold] card.
HEXAGHOST-HAUNTED_HAND.title: Haunted Hand
HEXAGHOST-HAUNTING_ECHO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the current Ghostflame is [gold]Ignited[/gold], [gold]Ignite[/gold] it again.
HEXAGHOST-HAUNTING_ECHO.title: Haunting Echo
HEXAGHOST-HEAT_CRUSH.title: Heat Crush
HEXAGHOST-HEAT_METAL.title: Heat Metal
HEXAGHOST-HEAT_SHIELD.title: Heat Shield
HEXAGHOST-HERE_AND_NOW.description:
At the start of your turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} .
At the end of your turn, [gold]Extinguish[/gold] the current Ghostflame.
HEXAGHOST-HERE_AND_NOW.title: Here and Now
HEXAGHOST-HEXAGUARD.title: Hexaguard
HEXAGHOST-HOT_STREAK.title: Hot Streak
HEXAGHOST-HOT_STREAK.description: At the end of your turn, apply {HotStreakPower:diff()} [gold]Soulburn[/gold] to enemies that already have [gold]Soulburn[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-INCINERATION.title: Incineration
HEXAGHOST-INCORPOREAL.title: Incorporeal
HEXAGHOST-INFERNAL_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, gain {InfernalFormPower:diff()} [gold]Intensity[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-INFERNAL_FORM.title: Infernal Form
HEXAGHOST-INTO_SHADOW.description: Whenever you [gold]Retract[/gold], your next card is free to play and [gold]Exhausts[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-INTO_SHADOW.title: Into Shadow
HEXAGHOST-KINDLE.title: Kindle
HEXAGHOST-LINGERING_SHADES.description:
Apply {SoulBurnPower:diff()} [gold]Soulburn[/gold]. 
Return all [gold]Ethereal[/gold] cards from the [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-LINGERING_SHADES.title: Lingering Shades
HEXAGHOST-LIVING_BOMB.description:
Apply {SoulBurnPower:diff()} [gold]Soulburn[/gold].
When it detonates, all other enemies also lose HP.
HEXAGHOST-LIVING_BOMB.title: Living Bomb
HEXAGHOST-NAUGHTY_SPIRIT.title: Naughty Spirit
HEXAGHOST-NAUGHTY_SPIRIT.description:
Apply {SoulBurnPower:diff()} [gold]Soulburn[/gold].
If the current Ghostflame is [gold]Ignited[/gold], [gold]Retract[/gold] and return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-NIGHTMARE_GUISE.title: Nightmare Guise
HEXAGHOST-NIGHTMARE_STRIKE.title: Nightmare Strike
HEXAGHOST-NIGHTMARE_VISION.title: Nightmare Vision
HEXAGHOST-OPPOSING_ACTION.title: Opposing Action
HEXAGHOST-OUTFLARE.title: Outflare
HEXAGHOST-PHANTOM_FIREBALL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy has [gold]Soulburn[/gold], detonate {IfUpgraded:show:all but 1.|it.}
HEXAGHOST-PHANTOM_FIREBALL.title: Phantom Fireball
HEXAGHOST-PHASE.title: Phase
HEXAGHOST-PHASE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card you play costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(0)}.
HEXAGHOST-POLTERGEIST.description: Whenever a card [gold]Exhausts[/gold], a random enemy loses {PoltergeistPower:diff()} HP.
HEXAGHOST-POLTERGEIST.title: Poltergeist
HEXAGHOST-POWER_FROM_BEYOND.title: Power from Beyond
HEXAGHOST-PREMONITION.description:
Choose a card type.
Play a random card of that type from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-PREMONITION.title: Premonition
HEXAGHOST-PREMONITION_CHOICE.title: Premonition
HEXAGHOST-RADIANT_REVERB.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove the target's [gold]Soulburn[/gold] to gain {IntensityPower:diff()} [gold]Intensity[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-RADIANT_REVERB.title: Radiant Reverb
HEXAGHOST-RAIN_OF_EMBERS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
The effect triggers X times in total.
HEXAGHOST-RAIN_OF_EMBERS.title: Rain of Embers
HEXAGHOST-REVERSAL.title: Reversal
HEXAGHOST-REVERSAL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the current Ghostflame is [gold]Ignited[/gold], [gold]Extinguish[/gold] it and deal damage {Repeat:diff()} more {Repeat:plural:time|times}.
HEXAGHOST-REWIND.description: Put {Cards:plural:a card|{Cards:diff()} cards} from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-REWIND.title: Rewind
HEXAGHOST-SEAR.title: Sear
HEXAGHOST-SEARING_WOUND.description: ALL enemies lose HP equal to their [gold]Soulburn[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-SEARING_WOUND.title: Searing Wound
HEXAGHOST-SECOND_SEAL.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:|Ethereal }[gold]Seal[/gold].
At the end of combat, gain {SecondSealPower:diff()} additional Gold.
HEXAGHOST-SECOND_SEAL.title: Second Seal
HEXAGHOST-SEVENTH_EYE.description:
Put a card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. 
Switch to a random Ghostflame and randomize it.
HEXAGHOST-SEVENTH_EYE.title: Seventh Eye
HEXAGHOST-SHADOW_GUISE.title: Shadow Guise
HEXAGHOST-SHADOW_STRIKE.title: Shadow Strike
HEXAGHOST-SHIELD_OF_NIGHT.title: Shield Of Night
HEXAGHOST-SIXTH_SEAL.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:|Ethereal }[gold]Seal[/gold].
At the end of combat, Upgrade a random card for every 13 unupgraded in [gold]Deck[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-SIXTH_SEAL.title: Fifth Seal
HEXAGHOST-SNEAKY_TEAKWOOD_MATCH.title: Sneaky Teakwood Match
HEXAGHOST-SPECTERS_WAIL.title: Specter's Wail
HEXAGHOST-SPECTRAL_GRACE.title: Spectral Grace
HEXAGHOST-SPOOK.title: Spook
HEXAGHOST-STEP_THROUGH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw 1 card for each [gold]Ignited[/gold] Ghostflame.
HEXAGHOST-STEP_THROUGH.title: Step Through
HEXAGHOST-STOKE_THE_FIRE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
For each [gold][color=#EFC851]Ignited Ghostflame[/color][/gold], Upgrade a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-STOKE_THE_FIRE.title: Stoke the Fire
HEXAGHOST-STRIKE_HEXAGHOST.title: Strike
HEXAGHOST-SWORD_OF_NIGHT.title: Sword Of Night
HEXAGHOST-THERMAL_TRANSFER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy has [gold]Soulburn[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-THERMAL_TRANSFER.title: Thermal Transfer
HEXAGHOST-THIRD_SEAL.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:|Ethereal }[gold]Seal[/gold].
At the end of combat, gain an additional normal card reward.
HEXAGHOST-THIRD_SEAL.title: Third Seal
HEXAGHOST-TIME_OF_NEED.description: Add a random {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |} Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
HEXAGHOST-TIME_OF_NEED.title: Time of Need
HEXAGHOST-TIME_WARP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you [gold]Advance[/gold] or [gold]Retract[/gold], return this from the [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-TIME_WARP.title: Time Warp
HEXAGHOST-TURN_IT_UP.title: Turn It Up
HEXAGHOST-UNFETTERED_FORM.title: Unfettered Form
HEXAGHOST-UNFETTERED_FORM.description: Ghostflames deal damage{IfUpgraded:show:,| and} apply [gold]Soulburn[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:, and grant [gold]Block[/gold]|} an additional time.
HEXAGHOST-UNLEASH_SPIRITS.title: Unleash Spirits
HEXAGHOST-UNLIMITED_POWER.description: From the first Ghostflame, ignite all Ghostflames in order.
HEXAGHOST-UNLIMITED_POWER.title: Unlimited Power
HEXAGHOST-VOLCANO_VISAGE.description: Whenever you [gold]Ignite[/gold] a Ghostflame, apply {VolcanoVisagePower:diff()} [gold]Soulburn[/gold] to ALL enemies.
HEXAGHOST-VOLCANO_VISAGE.title: Volcano Visage
HEXAGHOST-WHISPER_FROM_BEYOND.title: Whisper from Beyond
HEXAGHOST-WILDFIRE_HEXAGHOST.title: Wildfire
HEXAGHOST-WILDFIRE_HEXAGHOST.description: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy that doesn't already have it, gain {WildfirePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-WORTHY_SACRIFICE.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] {Cards:diff()} cards.
Transform Attacks and Skills into the opposite type{IfUpgraded:show: and Upgrade them|}.
HEXAGHOST-WORTHY_SACRIFICE.title: Worthy Sacrifice
HEXAGHOST-TEMPORAL_LEAP.title: Temporal Leap
HEXAGHOST-RADIANT_FLAME.title: Radiant Flame
